name: Vapman Wood Mouthpiece
summary: The Vapman Wooden Mouthpiece is an authentic replacement and upgrade accessory crafted for all Vapman vaporisers.
description: The Vapman Wooden Mouthpiece is an authentic replacement and upgrade accessory crafted for all Vapman vaporisers. Made from premium natural wood, it brings a warm, organic touch to every session while enhancing the artisan character of the Vapman brand. A popular add-on for customers who value aesthetics as much as performance. Each mouthpiece features its own unique grain patterns, ensuring no two pieces are alike. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
